scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @handitoff/protocol && npm run build -w @handitoff/config && npm run build -w @handitoff/crypto && npm run build -w @handitoff/transfer && npm run build -w @handitoff/turn && npm run build -w @handitoff/abuse && npm run build -w @handitoff/analytics
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @handitoff/api && npm run build -w @handitoff/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @handitoff/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @handitoff/web
scripts.start:api: npm run build -w @handitoff/api && npm run start -w @handitoff/api
